title: Why we Need the Holy Spirit
summary: “I am not able to bear all this people alone, because it is too heavy for me. And if thou deal thus with me, kill me, I pray thee, out of hand, if I have found favour in thy sight; and let me not see my wretchedness. And I will come down and talk with thee there: and I will take of the spirit which is upon thee, and will put it upon them; and they shall bear the burden of the people with thee, that thou bear it not thyself alone.” (Numbers 11:14-15,17). What spirit was upon Moses? The answer is the Spirit of God! Who would not want to have the Spirit of God that guided Moses? Moses was overwhelmed by the constant complaints and grumbling from the children of Israel who numbered about 2 million souls in total. God’s solution was to take the same Spirit that was upon Moses and share it with 70 elders. God wants more people to be filled with his Spirit. We cannot be happy with a few souls filled with the Holy Spirit in the church – the more souls filled the easier the path to heaven! We need our children to be filled with the Holy Spirit also. Today’s youth are being burdened with sins which earlier generations of youth have been shielded from. Like Moses they too feel the wear and tear of the stress and sin of the world invading their private spaces.
